query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(createdAt) as earliest, MAX(createdAt) as latest FROM calls GROUP BY status
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(createdAt) as earliest, MAX(createdAt) as latest FROM calls GROUP BY status
